description: Style NoteCut a dash with these sandals for the cosmopolitan male from coolers. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish hide jacket.Product DetailsBlack leather upper with forefoot and midfoot straps and a toe separatorPadded rubber and textured footbed Upper stitched to the outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves on the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareLeatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
